allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'next-server|next dev' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine)

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } } else { "No listener on 3000" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on 3001" } } else { "No listener on 3001" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false } }; "stopped")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -ge 3000 -and $_.LocalPort -le 3010 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess; Write-Output "---"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'next-dev|start-server.js|npm run dev' } | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, CommandLine)
